description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/fudaa/fudaa-scripts:21 with stages build, sonar, deploy, and release, and a global Maven cache at .m2/repository plus a Sonar cache at .sonar/cache. In the build stage add a build job that runs "mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS -U -Passemble,assemble-linux clean verify install", then moves the generated zip files from ui-application, crue-otfa and crue-aoc to the workspace, always archives all Fudaa-Crue-*.zip files and any */target/ directories as artifacts, publishes JUnit reports from */target/surefire-reports/TEST-*.xml and */target/failsafe-reports/TEST-*.xml, and is excluded on tag pipelines. In the sonar stage add a sonar job that runs "mvn sonar:sonar -Dsonar.branch.name=$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME -Dsonar.projectKey=fudaa-crue -Dsonar.organization=fudaa -Dsonar.host.url=https://sonarcloud.io -Dsonar.token=$SONAR_TOKEN", uses a per‑job cache .sonar/cache, depends on the build job, allows failure, and is excluded on tags. In the deploy stage add a deploy_release job that only runs on branches matching the regex ^release-.*$, excludes normal branches, runs "bash /ci_scripts/install_gpg.sh" then "mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS -Passemble,assemble-linux install", moves the same zip files to the workspace, and publishes the zip files as artifacts. In the release stage add a manual release job that runs "bash /ci_scripts/maven_tag_new_version_and_next_snapshot.sh", excludes tags, and has no artifacts, while the pipeline also defines variables DOCKER_HOST, MAVEN_CLI_OPTS, MAVEN_OPTS and references $SONAR_TOKEN and $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME.
